gun.name: Weapon blueprint
gun.summary: Fit a receiver, barrel, action, feed system, and sight. The complete arrangement determines the gun category.

staff.name: Staff assembly
staff.summary: Craft a mana crystal from magical materials, then pair it with a stave strong enough to contain it.

pistol-receiver.name: Pistol receiver
pistol-receiver.effect: A compact locked-breech frame keeps handling light.

revolver-frame.name: Revolver frame
revolver-frame.effect: A rigid wheel-gun frame trades quick reloads for steady alignment.

smg-receiver.name: SMG receiver
smg-receiver.effect: A compact stamped receiver stays controllable while moving.

shotgun-receiver.name: Shotgun receiver
shotgun-receiver.effect: A broad receiver supports heavy shells and absorbs some muzzle climb.

rifle-receiver.name: Rifle receiver
rifle-receiver.effect: A service receiver balances field handling and durability.

marksman-receiver.name: Precision receiver
marksman-receiver.effect: A bedded receiver improves settled shot grouping.

sniper-receiver.name: Long-action receiver
sniper-receiver.effect: A stiff long action controls recoil at the cost of a slower reload.

lmg-receiver.name: LMG receiver
lmg-receiver.effect: A reinforced receiver steadies sustained fire but adds servicing time.

launcher-receiver.name: Launcher chassis
launcher-receiver.effect: A braced chassis carries the launch tube and slows follow-up handling.

pistol-barrel.name: Pistol barrel
pistol-barrel.effect: A short rifled barrel keeps the weapon quick and slightly reduces range.

revolver-barrel.name: Revolver barrel
revolver-barrel.effect: A medium rifled barrel improves muzzle velocity.

short-rifled-barrel.name: Short rifled barrel
short-rifled-barrel.effect: A compact barrel stays mobile but gives up projectile lifetime.

smoothbore-barrel.name: Smoothbore barrel
smoothbore-barrel.effect: A short smoothbore opens the close-range pattern.

service-rifle-barrel.name: Service rifle barrel
service-rifle-barrel.effect: A general-purpose rifled barrel raises velocity without excess weight.

precision-barrel.name: Free-float precision barrel
precision-barrel.effect: A long free-float barrel tightens settled grouping and carries rounds farther.

heavy-barrel.name: Heavy machine barrel
heavy-barrel.effect: A heavy barrel resists climb during sustained fire.

launch-tube.name: Venturi launch tube
launch-tube.effect: A resonant-lined tube keeps the rocket stable in flight.

semi-auto-action.name: Semi-automatic action
semi-auto-action.effect: A conventional cycling action clears quickly on reload.

hammer-action.name: Double-action hammer
hammer-action.effect: A deliberate hammer pull slightly steadies each shot.

blowback-action.name: Blowback action
blowback-action.effect: A simple blowback action reloads easily but kicks harder.

pump-action.name: Pump action
pump-action.effect: A manually locked action contains the shell reliably and tames recoil.

gas-action.name: Gas-operated action
gas-action.effect: A tuned gas system reduces recoil and takes longer to service.

bolt-action.name: Turn-bolt action
bolt-action.effect: A locked bolt produces a clean, stable shot.

break-action.name: Break-open ignition
break-action.effect: A simple sealed ignition train accelerates the rocket cleanly.

pistol-magazine.name: Pistol box magazine
pistol-magazine.effect: A compact detachable box swaps quickly.

six-cylinder.name: Six-round cylinder
six-cylinder.effect: A precisely timed cylinder improves shot alignment.

smg-magazine.name: Thirty-round stick magazine
smg-magazine.effect: A long stick magazine increases capacity and slows the swap.

tube-magazine.name: Tubular shell magazine
tube-magazine.effect: A fixed tube carries an extra shell but is slower to replenish.

rifle-magazine.name: Rifle box magazine
rifle-magazine.effect: A curved detachable box adds capacity with a modest reload cost.

marksman-magazine.name: Low-profile precision magazine
marksman-magazine.effect: A low-profile box clears the firing position quickly.

internal-magazine.name: Internal precision magazine
internal-magazine.effect: A rigid internal feed preserves alignment but reloads slowly.

belt-box.name: Linked belt box
belt-box.effect: A large belt box carries more rounds and takes much longer to change.

rocket-cradle.name: Single-rocket cradle
rocket-cradle.effect: A centered cradle improves rocket launch consistency.

iron-sights.name: Iron sights
iron-sights.effect: Simple irons stay steady while moving.

bead-sight.name: Shotgun bead
bead-sight.effect: A broad bead favors close target acquisition.

red-dot-sight.name: Reflex sight
red-dot-sight.effect: A clear reflex point tightens moving shots.

magnified-optic.name: Magnified optic
magnified-optic.effect: Magnification improves settled precision while adding scoped weight.

telescopic-optic.name: Telescopic optic
telescopic-optic.effect: A long optic extends practical reach and commits the shooter more heavily.

ladder-sight.name: Launcher ladder sight
ladder-sight.effect: A range ladder keeps slow rockets on a narrower line.

prototype-receiver.name: Prototype signature receiver
prototype-receiver.effect: Signature machining reduces recoil without changing fire cadence.

prototype-barrel.name: Prototype signature barrel
prototype-barrel.effect: Signature rifling raises projectile speed without changing damage authoring.

prototype-action.name: Prototype signature action
prototype-action.effect: Signature cycling shortens reload downtime without changing shot cadence.

prototype-feed.name: Prototype signature feed
prototype-feed.effect: Signature feed geometry widens the magazine rather than increasing per-shot power.

prototype-sight.name: Prototype signature sight
prototype-sight.effect: Signature glass tightens settled aim without changing the shared band.

quartz-clock-crystal.name: Clockwork quartz crystal
quartz-clock-crystal.effect: Shortens every spell cooldown by 15% and slightly lengthens its cast commitment.

ember-prism-crystal.name: Ember prism crystal
ember-prism-crystal.effect: Increases all spell damage by 12% and raises mana costs by 10%.

mercy-pearl-crystal.name: Mercy pearl crystal
mercy-pearl-crystal.effect: Increases all spell healing by 18% while focusing projectiles into a tighter radius.

channeling-crystal.name: Channeling crystal
channeling-crystal.effect: Reduces the mana cost of every spell by 18% but slows its projectile.

stormglass-crystal.name: Stormglass crystal
stormglass-crystal.effect: Shortens cast windups by 22% and increases all spell damage by 8%, at a substantial mana premium.

geomancer-crystal.name: Geomancer crystal
geomancer-crystal.effect: Broadens every spell projectile and every placed area by 20%, and slows the travel of both.

pyre-heart-crystal.name: Pyre heart crystal
pyre-heart-crystal.effect: Increases Fire spell damage by 25%, at the cost of 6% from every other school.

rime-heart-crystal.name: Rime heart crystal
rime-heart-crystal.effect: Increases Frost spell damage by 25%, at the cost of 6% from every other school.

storm-heart-crystal.name: Storm heart crystal
storm-heart-crystal.effect: Increases Storm spell damage by 25%, at the cost of 6% from every other school.

arcane-heart-crystal.name: Arcane heart crystal
arcane-heart-crystal.effect: Increases Arcane spell damage by 25%, at the cost of 6% from every other school.

stone-heart-crystal.name: Stone heart crystal
stone-heart-crystal.effect: Increases Earth spell damage by 25%, at the cost of 6% from every other school.

aegis-prism-crystal.name: Aegis prism crystal
aegis-prism-crystal.effect: Raises shield and armor effective health by 15% and shortens their cooldowns by 5%.

signature-prism-crystal.name: Prototype signature prism
signature-prism-crystal.effect: Signature focusing raises the shared rarity anchor and accelerates projectiles by 10%.

ash-stave.name: Ash stave
ash-stave.effect: Tier 1 support. Ash is light and accepts only tier 1 mana crystals.

oak-stave.name: Runed oak stave
oak-stave.effect: Tier 2 support. Tempered bands and infused arcane dust contain tier 1–2 crystals.

ironwood-stave.name: Resonant ironwood stave
ironwood-stave.effect: Tier 3 support. Resonant metal and elemental infusions contain tier 1–3 crystals.

signature-stave.name: Prototype signature stave
signature-stave.effect: Tier 4 support. Boss essence contains Signature crystals without adding a second modifier.

compensated-barrel.name: Compensated barrel
compensated-barrel.effect: Ported gas ports tame muzzle climb at a small cost in velocity.

rimeglass-barrel.name: Rimeglass-lined barrel
rimeglass-barrel.effect: A quartz-lined bore runs cold, holding grouping and velocity through a long string.

scorchbloom-barrel.name: Scorchbloom-treated barrel
scorchbloom-barrel.effect: Husk-treated rifling carries a round further before it loses its line.

buffered-action.name: Resin-buffered action
buffered-action.effect: A resin buffer soaks the impulse of each cycle, at the cost of a slower reset.

stormcoil-action.name: Stormcoil action
stormcoil-action.effect: An induction-assisted cycle clears fast and throws the round harder.

drum-magazine.name: Drum magazine
drum-magazine.effect: A drum holds a great deal more and is slow and awkward to change.

quickdraw-clip.name: Quickdraw clip
quickdraw-clip.effect: A stripped, oiled clip changes in a moment and carries fewer rounds for it.

lattice-feed.name: Lattice-woven feed
lattice-feed.effect: A woven feed ramp holds alignment through a long belt without slowing the change.

holographic-sight.name: Holographic sight
holographic-sight.effect: A projected reticle stays on target through movement better than any glass.

thermal-optic.name: Thermal optic
thermal-optic.effect: Basalt-glass thermals tighten a settled shot and extend practical reach.

ember-focus-crystal.name: Ember focus crystal
ember-focus-crystal.effect: Increases Fire spell damage by 15%, at the cost of 4% from every other school.

rime-focus-crystal.name: Rime focus crystal
rime-focus-crystal.effect: Increases Frost spell damage by 15%, at the cost of 4% from every other school.

storm-focus-crystal.name: Storm focus crystal
storm-focus-crystal.effect: Increases Storm spell damage by 15%, at the cost of 4% from every other school.

arcane-focus-crystal.name: Arcane focus crystal
arcane-focus-crystal.effect: Increases Arcane spell damage by 15%, at the cost of 4% from every other school.

stone-focus-crystal.name: Stone focus crystal
stone-focus-crystal.effect: Increases Earth spell damage by 15%, at the cost of 4% from every other school.

ember-core-crystal.name: Ember core crystal
ember-core-crystal.effect: Increases Fire spell damage by 30% and shortens every cooldown by 8%, at the cost of 14% from every other school.

rime-core-crystal.name: Rime core crystal
rime-core-crystal.effect: Increases Frost spell damage by 30% and shortens every cooldown by 8%, at the cost of 14% from every other school.

storm-core-crystal.name: Storm core crystal
storm-core-crystal.effect: Increases Storm spell damage by 30% and shortens every cooldown by 8%, at the cost of 14% from every other school.

arcane-core-crystal.name: Arcane core crystal
arcane-core-crystal.effect: Increases Arcane spell damage by 30% and shortens every cooldown by 8%, at the cost of 14% from every other school.

stone-core-crystal.name: Stone core crystal
stone-core-crystal.effect: Increases Earth spell damage by 30% and shortens every cooldown by 8%, at the cost of 14% from every other school.

emberglass-lens-crystal.name: Emberglass lens crystal
emberglass-lens-crystal.effect: Accelerates every spell projectile by 18% and narrows it by 10%.

tidewalker-crystal.name: Tidewalker crystal
tidewalker-crystal.effect: Shortens every cast commitment by 15% at a 12% mana premium.

reedbinder-crystal.name: Reedbinder crystal
reedbinder-crystal.effect: Reduces every spell's mana cost by 12% and shortens its reach a little.

resonator-crystal.name: Resonator crystal
resonator-crystal.effect: Widens every placed area by 25% and lengthens every cooldown by 10%.

fulgurite-crystal.name: Fulgurite crystal
fulgurite-crystal.effect: Accelerates every projectile by 25% and every cast by 12%, at a 15% mana premium.

wardstone-crystal.name: Wardstone crystal
wardstone-crystal.effect: Raises shield and armor effective health by 12% and shortens their cooldowns by 10%.

mirrorbloom-crystal.name: Mirrorbloom crystal
mirrorbloom-crystal.effect: Increases all spell healing by 10% while slowing every projectile.

deeproot-crystal.name: Deeproot crystal
deeproot-crystal.effect: Widens every placed area by 12% and slows the projectile that carries it.

frostbloom-crystal.name: Frostbloom crystal
frostbloom-crystal.effect: Shortens every spell cooldown by 10% at a small mana premium.

willow-stave.name: Bound willow stave
willow-stave.effect: Tier 1 support. Resin-bound willow is cheap, light, and accepts only tier 1 mana crystals.

yew-stave.name: Deep yew stave
yew-stave.effect: Tier 2 support. Flux-treated yew contains tier 1-2 crystals.

duskthorn-stave.name: Duskthorn stave
duskthorn-stave.effect: Tier 3 support. Quicksilver-sealed duskthorn contains tier 1-3 crystals.

field-pistol.summary: Compact defensive sidearm: locked-breech pistol receiver, short barrel, semi-auto action, box magazine, and simple sights.

service-revolver.summary: Reliable wheel gun: rigid frame, revolver barrel, double-action hammer, timed cylinder, and iron sights.

compact-smg.summary: Close-quarters automatic: stamped SMG receiver, short rifled barrel, blowback action, stick magazine, and reflex-capable sights.

breaching-shotgun.summary: Pump shotgun: shell receiver, smoothbore barrel, locked pump action, tubular magazine, and a close-range bead.

starter-rifle.summary: General-purpose service rifle: rifle receiver and barrel, gas system, detachable magazine, and field sights. Prototype alternatives exercise a complete Signature assembly.

marksman-rifle.summary: Semi-automatic precision rifle: bedded receiver, free-float barrel, semi-auto action, low-profile magazine, and magnified glass.

long-sniper.summary: Long-range bolt rifle: stiff long action, precision barrel, turn bolt, internal magazine, and telescopic optic.

support-lmg.summary: Belt-fed support weapon: reinforced LMG receiver, heavy barrel, gas action, belt box, and durable field sights.

field-launcher.summary: Single-shot rocket launcher: braced chassis, venturi tube, sealed ignition, rocket cradle, and range ladder.

starter-staff.summary: A two-part focus. Craft one mana crystal for its all-spell effect, then mount it in a stave of equal or higher tier.
